value_metric: two A0 adapters (国家统计局 + 发改委) with a statistical-claim extractor that records every claim's indicator, value, UNIT, PERIOD, statistical basis (口径), and REVISION state, and forms facts ONLY from official numbers -- so official statistics enter as calibrated, revisable facts while media numbers never become facts

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: adapters + fixtures; the live stats.gov.cn extraction ran from the dev environment (0 cloud cost); wiring to the worker cron later makes each fetch a Worker subrequest under DIR-007
